title: Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay with 40% transparency + deploy

requirements.summary: Implement an Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay with 40% transparent backdrop for the date picker in Daily Entry screen
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping the date input in Daily Entry opens a full-screen overlay
The overlay backdrop has exactly 40% opacity (transparent/frosted appearance)
The calendar card (grid container) has a solid opaque surface so text is readable
Month grid is large, filling most of the screen width
Weekday headers are displayed in a muted, minimal style
Today's date has a subtle indicator (e.g., dot or ring)
The selected date has a filled-circle highlight consistent with Apple Calendar aesthetic
Overlay opens with a smooth fade + slide-up animation
Overlay closes with a matching reverse animation
Tapping outside the calendar card dismisses the overlay
Swiping down on the overlay dismisses it
The selected date is correctly applied to the date field in the form after selection
Works correctly in both light mode and dark mode

file_operations.description: Create a new Apple-style full-screen calendar overlay component. The component receives selectedDate, onSelectDate, and onClose props. Render a full-screen fixed-position overlay with a 40% transparent backdrop (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm). Within the overlay, center a solid opaque calendar card with rounded corners and shadow. The calendar card displays: a month header with navigation arrows, muted weekday labels (S M T W T F S) in uppercase small text, and a grid of day cells. Each day cell uses clean minimal typography. Today's date shows a subtle ring indicator. The selected date has a filled-circle highlight. Include smooth CSS transitions for fade-in/slide-up on mount and fade-out/slide-down on unmount. Handle click-outside-card to call onClose. Implement swipe-down gesture detection (touch events) on the overlay to dismiss. Ensure full readability in both light and dark modes by applying appropriate text colors and card backgrounds via Tailwind CSS and CSS custom properties.

Replace the existing date input with a read-only text field styled to look tappable. Add state to track whether the AppleCalendarOverlay is open. When the date field is clicked, set overlay open state to true. Import and render the AppleCalendarOverlay component conditionally when open. Pass the current selectedDate, an onSelectDate handler that updates the form date and closes the overlay, and an onClose handler that sets overlay open to false. Ensure the overlay does not interfere with existing form state or offline sync logic. Verify that the date field correctly displays the selected date after selection.

Add keyframe animations for the calendar overlay: @keyframes fadeIn (opacity 0 to 1), @keyframes fadeOut (opacity 1 to 0), @keyframes slideUp (translateY 20px to 0), @keyframes slideDown (translateY 0 to 20px). Define utility classes .animate-fade-in, .animate-fade-out, .animate-slide-up, .animate-slide-down with appropriate durations (300ms) and easing (ease-out). Ensure animations work smoothly in both light and dark modes.

requirements.summary: Deploy the updated SwipeTrack Pro frontend with the new Apple-style calendar overlay to the Internet Computer mainnet
acceptanceCriteria: The updated frontend is successfully deployed to the Internet Computer mainnet
The live canister URL serves the new build with the Apple-style calendar overlay
The backend canister remains functional and unchanged
No regressions in existing features post-deployment

file_operations.description: Verify that the app correctly imports and renders all routes including DailyEntry with the new calendar overlay. Ensure no regressions in AuthGuard, ProfileSetup modal, or notification reminders. This step confirms the frontend build is deployment-ready and that all existing features remain functional after integrating the calendar overlay.
